source: NFLverse draft_picks.csv — authoritative NFL draft data

WR.elite_profile: 80+ catches OR 1000+ yards final season. 15+ YPR. 20%+ team target share.

RB.elite_profile: 800+ rush yards AND 40+ receptions. 4.5+ YPC. Pass protection shown.

QB.elite_profile: 65%+ completion. 8.0+ YPA. Mobility big in SF.

TE.elite_profile: Receiving TE, 600+ college yards, good routes and hands, elite athleticism.
